body: import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.junit.Test;
import me.lemire.integercompression.differential.IntegratedBitPacking;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: # This line is commented out because the verifyException function is not defined in the provided partial Python translation.

# Index 3 out of bounds for length 3
self.assertEqual(str(e), "object of type 'NoneType' has no len()")
self.assertTrue("Index 640 out of bounds for length 11" in str(e))
# This line is commented out because it's not clear what the function `verifyException` is supposed to do.
# If it's a custom function, you'll need to implement it.
assert str(e.value) == "array index out of bounds"
